context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the liveview instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Define the LiveView's purpose and URL (via `live "/path"` in router).

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Define the `mount/3` contract: which params and session keys are used, what assigns are set.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: List all events (`handle_event`, `handle_info`, `handle_params`) this LiveView must handle.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write tests covering: mount renders, key assigns present, events update socket, streams for collections.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify the test **FAILS** with `mix test test/my_app_web/live/my_live_test.exs` — failure must be confirmed before moving to implementation.

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run these checks before considering the LiveView done.

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Stream usage threshold:** any collection that may exceed 10 items must use `stream/3` + `phx-update="stream"`.

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: [ ] Run `mix test` one final time; all tests green
